steps.prompt: 未能自动填写企鹅号标题，请手动补全后点击继续
请在声明弹框中勾选 AI 生成声明和发布内容自主声明后点击继续

steps.regex: 确认发布|确定发布|完成发布|提交发布|确认|发布

steps.script: () => { const isVisible = (el) => { if (!el) return false; const style = window.getComputedStyle(el); if (!style || style.visibility === 'hidden' || style.display === 'none') return false; const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect(); return rect.width > 0 && rect.height > 0; }; const norm = (s) => (s || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const modal = document.querySelector('[role="dialog"], .modal, .dialog'); const scope = modal || document; const candidates = Array.from(scope.querySelectorAll('button, [role="button"]')).filter(isVisible); const btn = candidates.find(el => /确定|确认|提交|发布/.test(norm(el.textContent || '')) && !/取消|返回|关闭|草稿/.test(norm(el.textContent || ''))); if (btn) { btn.click(); return { success: true }; } return { success: false }; }

() => { const norm = (s) => (s || '').replace(/\s+/g, ' ').trim(); const isVisible = (el) => { if (!el) return false; const style = window.getComputedStyle(el); if (!style || style.visibility === 'hidden' || style.display === 'none') return false; const rect = el.getBoundingClientRect(); return rect.width > 0 && rect.height > 0; }; const modal = document.querySelector('[role="dialog"], .modal, .dialog'); const scope = modal || document; const text = norm(scope.textContent || ''); if (!/发布成功|已发布|发布完成/.test(text)) return { skipped: true }; const btns = Array.from(scope.querySelectorAll('button, [role="button"], a')).filter(isVisible); const btn = btns.find(el => /完成|关闭|返回|知道了/.test(norm(el.textContent || ''))); if (btn) { btn.click(); return { success: true }; } return { success: false }; }

steps.prompt: 请在企鹅号页面完成最终发布确认，出现发布成功后点击继续
